messages.content: Kindly revise and proofread. : Yes, the FUJIKA Hi-PET Kerosene Heater, the Masterpiece of Japanese heating Technology, is making a comeback by popular demand.
Yes, the FUJIKA Hi-PET Kerosene Heater, the masterpiece of Japanese heating technology, is making a comeback due to popular demand.
Yes, the made-in-Japan FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, the masterpiece of Japanese heating technology, is making a comeback due to popular demand.
Yes, the made-in-Japan FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, renowned as the masterpiece of Japanese heating technology, is making a grand return due to overwhelming popular demand.
This is the Yes, the made-in-Japan FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, renowned as the masterpiece of Japanese heating technology, is making a grand return due to overwhelming popular demand.

This is the revised and proofread version:

Yes, the made-in-Japan FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, renowned as the masterpiece of Japanese heating technology, is making a grand return due to overwhelming popular demand.
please revise it for the leaflet to be more concise
Introducing the FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, the revered masterpiece of Japanese heating technology, now making a triumphant return due to overwhelming demand!
Translate to Japanese please :
日本製のFUJIKA石油ストーブは、日本の暖房技術の傑作として高い評価を受け、圧倒的な需要により大々的に復活しています！
summarize text please: FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, the revered masterpiece of Japanese heating technology, now making a triumphant return due to overwhelming demand!
The highly acclaimed FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, known for its excellence in Japanese heating technology, is making a triumphant comeback in response to immense demand!
please  translate to Japanese
圧倒的な需要に応え、日本の暖房技術の名品であるFUJIKA石油ストーブが栄光の復活を遂げています！
日本の暖房技術の名品であるFUJIKA石油ストーブが、圧倒的な需要に応えて、栄光の復活を遂げています！
please re-edit more briefly: The highly acclaimed FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, known for its excellence in Japanese heating technology, is making a triumphant comeback in response to immense demand!
日本の暖房技術の名品であるFUJIKA石油ストーブが、圧倒的な需要に応えて栄光の復活を遂げます！
大評判のFUJIKA石油ストーブが、日本の優れた暖房技術の名品として、圧倒的な需要に応えて華々しくカムバックします！
The highly acclaimed FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, known for its excellence in Japanese heating technology, is making a triumphant comeback in response to immense demand!
高い評価を受けているFUJIKA石油ストーブは、優れた日本の暖房技術で知られており、圧倒的な需要に応えて華々しい復活を遂げています！

please make this text more concise : The highly acclaimed FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, known for its excellence in Japanese heating technology, is making a triumphant comeback in response to immense demand!
FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, renowned for superior Japanese heating technology, triumphantly returns due to immense demand!
The highly acclaimed FUJIKA Kerosene Heater, known for its excellence in Japanese heating technology, is making a triumphant comeback in response to immense demand!
高く評価されたFUJIKA石油ストーブは、日本の暖房技術の優れた点で知られており、圧倒的な需要に応えて華々しく復活します！
